steps.title: Use the negative solution
steps.content:
The solutions come from $x-k=0$ or $8x+t-1=0$. Since $k$ is positive, $x=k$ cannot equal the negative solution $-\frac{21}{8}$. Therefore:
$$
8(-\frac{21}{8})+t-1=0
$$

steps.title: Find the value
steps.content: Simplify the equation: $$ -21+t-1=0 $$ $$ t=22 $$ The answer is 22.
